summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Terre de Beauce ERP new features including client tarification, chauffeur portal, pointages, and facture generation. All major functionality working correctly.

Chauffeur creation with automatic code_acces generation - created 'Jean Dupont' with code '43FC7D'
Chauffeur Portal login and interface - successfully logged in and interface fully functional
Chantier creation with tarification and affectations - created 'CH-TEST-2026' with tarifs and Jean Dupont assignment
Pointages page with consolidated view and filters - interface working correctly
Factures page with generation functionality - interface working correctly
Configuration page company info update - successfully updated telephone, IBAN, BIC
Navigation between all pages working correctly
Backend API comprehensive testing - 21/21 tests passed (100% success rate)
New features backend testing - 19/19 tests passed (100% success rate)
